---
title: Binomial Distribution
subtitle: Exponential Family
description: | 
 
categories:
  - Statistics
author: Kwangmin Kim
date: 02/27/2023
draft: false
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
---

<ul class="nav nav-pills" id="language-tab" role="tablist">
  <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
    <button class="nav-link active" id="Korean-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#Korean" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="Korean" aria-selected="true">Korean</button>
  </li>
  <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
    <button class="nav-link" id="English-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#English" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="knitr" aria-selected="false">English</button>
  </li>

<div class="tab-content" id="language-tabcontent">

<div class="tab-pane fade  show active" id="Korean" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="Korean-tab">

::: {#Korean .tab-pane .fade .show .active role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="Korean-tab"}



## Binomial Distribution

::: {#def-binomial}

м„ұкіө нҷ•лҘ мқҙ pмқё bernoulli distributionмқ„ n лІҲ мӢңн–үн–Ҳмқ„ л•Ң м„ұкіөнҡҹмҲҳлҘј нҷ•лҘ  ліҖмҲҳ XлЎң к°–лҠ” probability distributionмқ„ binomial distributionмқҙлқј н•ңлӢӨ.
probability mass functionмқҖ 

мҰү, 
$$
\begin{aligned}
  f_X(x;n,p)&=\binom{n}{x}p^{x}(1-p)^{n-x} \text{ } (y=0,1,2, ..., n)\\
\end{aligned}
$$ 
мқҙкі  NotationмқҖ ліҙнҶө $X \sim Bin(n,p) \text{ or } X \sim B(n,p) \text{ or } X \sim Binomial(n,p)$ мҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ м“°мқёлӢӨ (binomial distributionмқҖ bernoulli distributionмқ„ м „м ңлЎң н•ңлӢӨ). 

:::


### Expectation
$$
\begin{aligned}
    \text{Let } &I_i \text{ be } 1\{x_i=1\} \\ 
    X&=\sum_{i=1}^{n}I_i=I_1+I_2+ ... +I_n\\
  \text{E}(X)&=\text{E}(\sum_{i=1}^{n}I_i)\\
             &=\text{E}(I_1+I_2+ ... +I_n)\\
             &=\text{E}(I_1)+\text{E}(I_2)+ ... +\text{E}(I_n)\\
             &=p+p+...+p\\
             &=np
\end{aligned}
$$ 


### Variance
$$
\begin{aligned}
  \text{Var}(X)&=\text{Var}(I_1+I_2+ ... +I_n)\\
             &=\text{Var}(I_1)+\text{Var}(I_2)+ ... +\text{Var}(I_n)\\
             &=p(1-p)+p(1-p)+...+p(1-p)\\
             &=np(1-p)
\end{aligned}
$$ 

### Example

мҢҚлһҖмқҙ лӮҳмҳ¬ нҷ•лҘ мқҙ 0.05лқјкі  к°Җм •н–Ҳмқ„ л•Ң Super Marketм—җм„ң 1 pack of 12 eggsмқ„ кө¬л§Өн–Ҳмқ„ л•Ң 

*  3к°ңмқҳ eggsм—җм„ң мҢҚлһҖмқҙ лӮҳмҳ¬ нҷ•лҘ мқҖ
$$
\begin{aligned}
    X&\sim Bin(12,0.05)\\
    f(X=3)&=\binom{12}{3}0.05^3 0.95^9
\end{aligned}
$$
мқҙлӢӨ.

*  м Ғм–ҙлҸ„ 3к°ңмқҳ eggsм—җм„ң мҢҚлһҖмқҙ лӮҳмҳ¬ нҷ•лҘ мқҖ
$$
\begin{aligned}
    P(X\ge3)&=1-F_X(3)\\
            &=1-(f(X=3)+f(X=2)+f(X=1)+f(X=0))\\
            &=1-(\binom{12}{3}0.05^3 0.95^9+\binom{12}{2}0.05^2 0.95^{10}+\\
            &\binom{12}{1}0.05^1 0.95^{11}+\binom{12}{0}0.05^0 0.95^{12})
\end{aligned}
$$
мқҙлӢӨ.


лӢӨлҘё мҳҲмӢңлЎңлҠ”, л¶„мһҗ м§„лӢЁ мӢңмһҘм—җм„ң golden standardлқјкі  нҸүк°Җл°ӣлҠ” PCR (Polynomial Chain Reaction)м—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” medical deviceк°Җ 2000 лҢҖ мӨ‘ 5лҢҖ кјҙлЎң кё°кі„м Ғ кІ°н•Ёмқҙ л°ңкІ¬лҗңлӢӨкі  к°Җм •н•  л•Ң, 
1л…„м—җ нҸүк·  100лҢҖмқҳ л¶„мһ” м§„лӢЁ мһҘл№„лҘј кіөкёүл°ӣлҠ” кө¬л§Өмһҗ мһ…мһҘм—җм„ң мһҘл№„мқҳ кІ°н•Ёмқҙ л°ңмғқн•  м—°к°„ нҸүк· кіј л¶„мӮ°мқҳ м¶”м •мқҖ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷлӢӨ.

$$
\begin{aligned}
    X&\sim Bin(100,\frac{5}{2000})\\
    f(X=x)&=\binom{100}{x}\frac{5}{2000}^x (1-\frac{5}{2000})^{100-x}\\
    \text{E}(X)&=100(\frac{5}{2000})\\
    \text{Var}(X)&=100(\frac{5}{2000})(1-\frac{5}{2000})
\end{aligned}
$$


## Multinomial Distribution

::: {#def-multinomial}

nлІҲмқҳ лҸ…лҰҪ мӢңн–үм—җм„ң к°Ғ к°Ғ p_1, p_2, ..., p_n мқҳ м„ұкіө нҷ•лҘ лЎң E_1, E_2, ..., E_n мӨ‘ м–ҙлҠҗ н•ҳлӮҳлҘј л°ңмғқмӢңнӮ¬ л•Ң к°Ғ event E_iм—җ лҢҖмқ‘лҗҳлҠ” л°ңмғқ нҡҹмҲҳлҘј нҷ•лҘ  ліҖмҲҳ X_1, X_2, ..., X_n лЎң к°–лҠ” joint probability mass functionмқҖ 

$$
\begin{aligned}
  f_X(\mathbf X = x_1,x_2, ...,x_n)&=\binom{n}{x_1,x_2, ..., x_n}p_1^{x_1}(p_2)^{x_2}\dots (p_n)^{x_n} \\ 
\end{aligned}
$$ 
мқҙлӢӨ. (лӢЁ, $\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_i=n, \sum_{i=1}^{n}p_i=1$) 

:::

### Example

мЈјмӮ¬мң„лҘј 5 лІҲ лҚҳм§Ҳ л•Ң 1 лҳҗлҠ” 6мқҳ лҲҲмқҙ 1лІҲ, 3, 4 лҳҗлҠ” 5мқҳ лҲҲмқҙ 2лІҲ , 2мқҳ лҲҲмқҙ 2лІҲ лӮҳмҳ¬ нҷ•лҘ мқҖ

$$
\begin{aligned}
    &x_1= 1, x_2=2, x_3=2\\
    f(X=(1,2,2))&=\binom{5}{1,2,3}\frac{1}{3}^1\frac{1}{2}^2\frac{1}{6}^2
\end{aligned}
$$
мқҙлӢӨ.

:::

</div>


## Blog Guide Map Link

* [Statistics Blog](../guide_map/index.qmd)
* [Engineering Blog](../../Engineering/guide_map/index.qmd)
* [Deep Learning Blog](../../DL/guide_map/index.qmd)
* [Machine Learning Blog](../../ML/guide_map/index.qmd)
* [Mathematics Blog](../../Mathmatics/guide_map/index.qmd)
* [Patent Blog](../../Patent/guide_map/index.qmd)
* [Validation Blog](../../Validation/guide_map/index.qmd)
